items.raw_excerpt: While the median house price in Melbourne rose by only 4.4 per cent in the 12 months, house prices in some of Victoria's regional towns soared by up to 50 per cent.
items.summary_en: House prices in Victoria's small regional towns have jumped as much as 50 percent in the past year. The gains far outpace Melbourne's modest 4.4 percent rise.
items.summary_ko: 빅토리아주의 작은 지역 도시들의 집값이 지난 1년간 최대 50% 급등했습니다. 이는 멜버른의 4.4% 상승률을 크게 웃도는 수치입니다.
items.title_en: House prices in Victoria's small regional towns surge up to 50%
items.title_ko: 빅토리아주 작은 지역 도시들의 집값이 최대 50% 급등
items.title_original: Victoria's tiny regional towns soar by up to 50 per cent leaving Melbourne trailing behind - Domain

items.summary_en: A new museum exhibition explores Norway's World War II resistance movement. The display features stories and artifacts from the local fight against occupation.
items.summary_ko: 노르웨이의 제2차 세계대전 저항운동을 조명하는 새로운 전시가 박물관에서 열렸다. 이 전시는 점령기에 맞선 지역 주민들의 이야기와 유물을 소개한다.
items.title_en: Resistance struggle exhibition opens at museum

items.raw_excerpt: Heavy security and surveillance are in place as the Cockroach Janta Party stages its second protest at Jantar Mantar.
items.summary_en: Heavy security and surveillance are in place as the Cockroach Janta Party stages its second protest at Jantar Mantar. The group with the unusual name is back in Delhi for another rally.
items.summary_ko: Cockroach Janta Party(일명 바퀴벌레 정당)가 잔타르 만타르에서 두 번째 시위를 열자 중무장 경비와 감시 체제가 갖춰졌다. 독특한 이름의 이 단체가 다시 델리 거리에 나섰다.
items.title_en: Cockroach Janta Party holds second protest in Delhi
items.title_ko: 델리서 '바퀴벌레 정당' 두 번째 시위…경비 삼엄
items.title_original: Heavy security in place as CJP stages second protest at Jantar Mantar

items.raw_excerpt: Officials have determined that a wildfire that prompted evacuation orders in West Kelowna, B.C., earlier this week was caused by a prohibited campfire inside a regional park.
items.summary_en: Officials say a wildfire in West Kelowna, British Columbia was started by a prohibited campfire. The fire led to evacuation orders in the area earlier this week. No injuries have been reported.
items.summary_ko: 브리티시컬럼비아주 웨스트켈로나 산불이 금지된 야영 모닥불로 인해 발생한 것으로 당국이 확인했다. 이 불로 이번 주 초 해당 지역에 대피 명령이 내려졌다.
items.title_en: Wildfire that prompted evacuations in West Kelowna was caused by prohibited campfire, officials say
items.title_ko: 웨스트켈로나 대피령 산불, 금지된 캠프파이어가 원인
items.title_original: Wildfire that prompted evacuations in West Kelowna was caused by prohibited campfire, officials say

items.raw_excerpt: A court hears two brothers were tracked riding recklessly for 13km and attempted to evade police following a riot in Newcastle.
items.summary_en: Two brothers were denied bail after a court heard they rode recklessly for 13 kilometers while trying to escape police following a riot in Newcastle. The pair were tracked by authorities during the chase through the city.
items.summary_ko: 두 형제가 뉴캐슬에서 발생한 폭동 이후 13km를 무모하게 질주하며 경찰을 따돌리려 한 혐의로 법원에서 구속이 기각됐다. 당국은 이들을 추적해 체포한 것으로 알려졌다.
items.title_en: No bail for brothers after Newcastle riot chase
items.title_ko: 뉴캐슬 폭동 후 형제 무모한 질주, 법원 구속 기각
items.title_original: No bail for brothers accused of wreaking havoc after Newcastle riot

items.raw_excerpt: Adelaide Crows fans clap at the sixth minute of the team's match against Melbourne to wish former number-six player Tony Modra well in his recovery from surgery following a serious truck crash.
items.summary_en: Adelaide Crows fans clapped at the six-minute mark of their match against Melbourne to support former number-six player Tony Modra. Modra is recovering from surgery after a serious truck crash. Club great Mark Ricciuto said he is optimistic about Modra's recovery.
items.summary_ko: 애들레이드 크로우스 팬들이 멜버른과의 경기 시작 6분째에 기립박수를 보내며 전직 6번 선수 토니 모드라의 쾌유를 기원했다. 모드라는 심각한 트럭 사고 후 수술을 받고 회복 중이다. 구단 레전드 마크 리치우토는 그의 회복 상태에 대해 낙관적인 입장을 밝혔다.
items.title_en: Crows Fans Applaud for Injured Former Player
items.title_ko: 애들레이드 크로우스 팬들, 전직 선수 토니 모드라 쾌유 기원 박수
items.title_original: Applause for Modra as Ricciuto describes optimism following surgery
